calendar.matters:
Defendant'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And To Recall Writ Of Execution
Off Calendar Mar-23-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Anne Wickers, Esq. of Pillsbury Winthrop for Defendant/Moving Party, Michael Kushner
Danny Patel, Plaintiff in propria persona
Alicia Patel, Witness for the Plaintiff,

Winess for the Plaintiff was sworn and questioned by Defendant's counsel.
Plaintiff was sworn and questioned by Defendant's counsel.
Defendant was sworn and questioned by Defendant's counsel.
After all oral testimony was heard the court denied DEFENDANT MICHAEL KUSHNER'S Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And To Recall Writ Of Execution. Order was signed in open court. (AJR/301/AC) JOYCE D. LONG, CSR: 8620
